title: Real Estate Website
description:
## Overview

Production-grade real estate platform built with the **MERN** stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js) and **MUI**. Enables buyers to discover properties via fast search, granular filters, and rich detail pages with agent contact workflows.

### Goals
- Help users find relevant listings quickly with robust search.
- Provide trustworthy, engaging listing pages with complete details.
- Improve lead generation via integrated agent contact forms.

### Key Features
- Faceted search: location, price range, bedrooms, bathrooms, amenities.
- Sort by relevance, newest, price, and proximity.
- Mobile-first UI with responsive image galleries and thumbnails.
- Saved filters and deep-linked, SEO-friendly URLs.

### Architecture
- React + MUI front-end with route-based code splitting.
- Express/Node API for listings, agents, and saved searches.
- MongoDB schemas for `Listing`, `Agent`, and `Inquiry`.
- Image CDN + lazy loading for fast media delivery.

### Role & Responsibilities
- Designed schema and API endpoints.
- Implemented search/filter UX and gallery.

### Results
- Median page load: < 1.5s on 4G.
- 32% increase in qualified inquiries (pilot).
summary: MERN real estate platform with fast search, filters, and lead flows.

title: Financial Website
description:

title: Patient Referral Network Platform
description:
## Overview

A healthcare technology platform built with **MERN** stack that streamlines patient referrals between clinics and healthcare providers. The system enables seamless communication, referral tracking, and secure patient data management across a network of medical facilities.

### Goals
- Simplify patient referral workflows between healthcare providers.
- Reduce referral processing time and administrative overhead.
- Ensure secure, HIPAA-compliant patient data management.
- Provide real-time visibility into referral status and outcomes.

### Key Features
- **Referral Management**: Create, track, and manage patient referrals in real-time.
- **Clinic Directory**: Searchable directory of participating clinics and specialists.
- **Patient Dashboard**: Secure portal for patients to view referrals and appointments.
- **Provider Dashboard**: Comprehensive view of incoming/outgoing referrals.
- **Referral Agreements**: Digital agreement management between participating facilities.
- **Status Tracking**: Real-time updates on referral progress and approvals.
- **Secure Messaging**: HIPAA-compliant communication between providers.

### Architecture
- React front-end with role-based access control (RBAC).
- Express/Node API with healthcare data security protocols.
- MongoDB for patient records, referrals, and clinic data.
- JWT authentication and encryption for sensitive data.

### Role & Responsibilities
- **Full Stack Development**: Built end-to-end features including dashboards and referral workflows.
- **DevOps & CI/CD**: Architected and managed automated deployment pipelines using GitHub Actions.
- **Monitoring & Logging**: Implemented comprehensive monitoring, alerting, and centralized logging for production systems.
- **Security & Compliance**: Ensured HIPAA compliance, data encryption, and security best practices.

### Results
- Reduced referral processing time by 65%.
- Achieved 99.95% system uptime with automated failover.
- Deployed 50+ releases per month with zero-downtime deployments.
- Supported 200+ healthcare facilities and 500K+ patient records.
summary: Healthcare referral network with full stack dev and DevOps management.

title: Website Reservation System (Capstone Project)
description:
## Overview

A capstone project focused on developing a **Website Reservation System** for **John Cezar Waterfun Resort**, which currently operates without an online booking platform. The system aims to streamline reservations, improve customer experience, and support the resort’s business operations.

### Goals
- Provide customers with a convenient online reservation process.
- Centralize booking management for the business.
- Reduce manual reservation errors and improve efficiency.

### Key Features
- Online reservation and scheduling system.
- Room and facility availability management.
- Customer information and booking records.
- Admin dashboard for reservation monitoring.

### Architecture
- MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js).
- RESTful API for reservations, users, and availability.
- Role-based access for customers and business staff.

### Role & Responsibilities
- Project Manager and Full Stack Developer.
- System design, database modeling, and API development.
- UI/UX design using MUI, Figma, and Canva.

###
summary: Capstone MERN-based reservation system for a water resort.

title: Multi-Tenant SaaS Platform (Live Chat)
description:
## Overview

Production-grade multi-tenant SaaS platform providing real-time live chat solutions with a **MERN** stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js) and **Socket.io** for real-time communication. The platform includes both a customer-facing chat widget and a comprehensive admin portal for conversation management.

### Goals
- Enable businesses to communicate with customers in real-time.
- Provide intuitive chat management tools for support teams.
- Support multiple tenants with complete data isolation and custom branding.
- Deliver scalable, low-latency messaging infrastructure.

### Key Features
- **Live Chat Widget**: Customizable, embeddable chat widget for websites.
- **Agent Portal**: Dashboard for managing conversations, queues, and chat history.
- **Queue Management**: Intelligent routing and queue monitoring for incoming chats.
- **Chat History**: Persistent conversation storage with search and filtering.
- **Multi-Tenant Architecture**: Secure data isolation across multiple clients.
- **Real-Time Notifications**: Instant updates for agents and customers using WebSockets.
- **Admin Dashboard**: Tenant metrics, analytics, and configuration management.

### Architecture
- React + Socket.io front-end with real-time state synchronization.
- Express/Node API with tenant middleware for multi-tenancy.
- MongoDB schemas for `Conversation`, `Message`, `Agent`, and `Tenant`.
- WebSocket server for real-time bidirectional communication.
- Redis for message queuing and session management.

### Role & Responsibilities
- **Project Architect**: Designed multi-tenant system architecture and data models.
- **Team Lead**: Led development, code reviews, and technical decision-making.
- **Core Developer**: Implemented real-time messaging engine, widget, and admin portal.
- **Performance Optimization**: Optimized WebSocket connections and database queries.

### Results
- Sub-100ms message latency across the globe.
- Supported 50K+ concurrent users during pilot.
- 99.8% uptime SLA achieved in production.
- 40% reduction in support response time for adopting businesses.
summary: Multi-tenant MERN SaaS with real-time live chat widget and management portal.
